name: BB:CategoryDefinition: High Magnitude Events
notes: Edit this BB to the severity, credibility, and relevance levels you wish to generate an event. The defaults are: severity (8), credibility (8), and relevance (8).
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: High Magnitude Events on events which are detected by the undefined system
conditions_text: where the Event Severity is greater than 6
where the Event Credibility is greater than 7
where the Event Relevance is greater than 7
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: High Magnitude Events on events which are detected by the undefined system
AND where the Event Severity is greater than 6
AND where the Event Credibility is greater than 7
AND where the Event Relevance is greater than 7
